title: All Round Modpack
description: A wonderful modpack that works for content creators, or people who like to play around with friends!
body:
A modpack that has all round really nice mods.
This modpack has the recording editing software Flashback,
but also quality of life mods like Worldedit, Essential and Simple Voice Chat. I added Particular, More Mob Varients, etc., to make the game look better.
Last of all, I added Only Hammers, Origins for quality of life.
I have tried this on my Windows and MacOS pc, so it should work for you! I hope it works on Linux, my apologies if that is not the case.
